column8: Six months from now I'll be at university________I decide to take a year off first.
column9: We'd better leave early tomorrow__________there's a lot of traffic when we get to Doncaster.
column10: You can watch the film _________you promise to go straight to bed when it finished.
column11: Let's go to Mirabella's tonight____________you haven't been there before.
column12: ____________I've still got my health, I don't mind how poor I am!
column13: You'd better take a sweater with you________it gets cold tonight.
column14: Do what you like_________you don't make any noise.
column15: I'm not going to worry__________she hasn't called by midnight.
